title: Commercial office, Type II-A, fully within limits and complete submittal
notes: Negative control — nothing should fail. Tests false-positive rate.
plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
Occupancy Group: B
Construction Type: II-A
Stories: 3
Height: 45 ft
Per-story area: 20,000 sf (limit 37,500)
Fully sprinklered: NFPA 13
Design occupant load: 300
Fire alarm: NFPA 72
Accessible parking with van-accessible space. Accessible route / path of travel. ADA restroom per ANSI A117.1. Tactile and braille signage.
IECC energy code compliance path identified.
Ventilation rate / outdoor air per IMC Table 403.3.
Panic hardware at all Group B exits.
Electrical: 800 A service, main breaker.
CALGreen water-efficient fixtures (1.28 gpf). Construction waste management plan diverts 75%.
